ABOUT MEG Meg Hillier is the Member of Parliament for Hackney South and Shoreditch and Chair of the Treasury Select Committee. The committee examines the expenditure, administration and policy of HM Treasury, HM Revenue & Customs, and associated public bodies, including the Bank of England and the Financial Conduct Authority. ​ ​ Meg also chairs the Liaison Committee – a committee comprised of all select committee Chairs. It considers the overall work of select committees, promotes effective scrutiny of Government, and questions the Prime Minister. From 2015-2024, she was Chair of the Public Accounts Committee – the cross-party committee that scrutinises the value for money of public spending and holds the Government to account for the delivery of public services. First elected in 2005, Meg has been a Home Office Minister and Shadow Secretary of State for Energy and Climate Change. Recent Posts April 2026 Monthly Report See here for what I've been up to in Hackney and Westminster in March. Work with Meg Job Title: Constituency Support Officer (4 days a week) Working For: Meg Hillier MP (Hackney South and Shoreditch) Location: Westminster, London Salary: In line with IPSA pay scales. Pro rata 4 days a week. Meg Hillier MP is seeking a Constituency Support Officer to join her Westminster office. The successful candidate will support Meg and her team primarily by responding to enquiries from constituents. They will also assist senior colleagues across the team, by carrying Meg's Hackney Gazette Column: Market on Ridley Road is not under threat See here for my latest Hackney Gazette column.
